race.comment: PRINCE TYCOON (2) resumes and brings the obvious form lines from last campaign. He was on the heels of the placegetters first up in the G3 Red Anchor at Moonee Valley last time in behind a dominant winner in Napoleonic, sent out a $4 chance there. This level suits and he draws ideally having jumped out well leading in. CONFLICT (9) is racing well, battling home for a solid fourth at Sandown Lakeside last time having won two on the bounce prior. He'll be hard to hold out. RADICAL DUDE (15) beat a small field easily on debut, struggling next tie at Cranbourne in a messy finish. He's got ability and can bounce back. SOME PEOPLE CALLME (3) resumes having gone to the paddock a narrow winner. He draws nicely and can run well.
